message:
fix(e2e): handle TrackedPermit::send fallibility in messaging test

Add .expect("send via permit") to TrackedPermit::send(42) in the
e2e_tracked_mpsc_commit_with_lab_replay test, adapting to the prior
change that made send() return Result to handle receiver-dropped
channels gracefully.
